hero.eyebrow: Certified installers in the Canary Islands

hero.body: We design, install and maintain solar energy systems tailored to the energy reality of the Canarian archipelago. No fine print.

projects.title: Companies that have taken control of their energy

stats.quote: "The energy you consume today defines the company you will be tomorrow."

founder.title: 20 years building a more sustainable energy model
founder.name: Carla Isarí Díaz Ortega, CEO & Owner
founder.body1: Carla has spent two decades leading renewable energy projects in the Canarian archipelago, combining technical rigour with a deep understanding of the territory and its energy needs.
founder.quote: "Every project is an opportunity to build a more resilient Canarias."
